summary: Terminal State Orchestrator testing complete - unified API endpoint working perfectly. Frontend successfully refactored to use single endpoint /api/terminal/state/{symbol} instead of multiple APIs. All trading terminal blocks functioning correctly with mock data.
passed_tests: Unified terminal state endpoint for BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT
Decision block content validation (action, direction, confidence, reasons)
Microstructure block content (imbalance, spread, liquidity, state)
Execution panel content (mode, size, entry/stop/target, R:R)
Position block content (current position or 'No open position')
Risk metrics content (heat, drawdown, kill switch)
System state content (adaptive, scheduler, profile, risk status)
Frontend uses ONLY unified API endpoint
No calls to individual terminal APIs
Mock data integration (microstructure, positions, portfolio, risk)
